zh-CN.name: 勿忘我
zh-CN.intro: 勿忘我是一种小小的花，花瓣蓝蓝的，像一颗颗小星星。它的名字好像在说‘请不要忘记我’，很温柔也很特别。

story.title: 💙小勿忘我的新家
story.body: 春天来了，花园里开满了五颜六色的花。在墙角边，有一小丛蓝蓝的勿忘我。它的花朵小小的，像一颗颗蓝色的小星星。勿忘我有点难过，‘我这么小，谁会注意我呢？’有一天，一只小蜜蜂飞过来，哭着说：‘我迷路了，找不到回家的路了。’勿忘我说：‘别急，你看着我蓝色的花朵，就像路上的小标记。你跟着我，我送你回家。’小蜜蜂跟着一丛丛勿忘我，飞出了花园，终于找到了家。小蜜蜂感激地说：‘谢谢你，你的花虽然小，但很漂亮，而且你帮助了我。我永远都不会忘记你！’勿忘我开心地笑了，它知道自己虽然小，也是有意义的。从此，勿忘我开得更多，蓝蓝的一片，好像在对每个人说：请不要忘记我呀！

knowledge.title: 为什么叫勿忘我？
knowledge.body: 勿忘我的花朵小小的，蓝蓝的，像星星一样。人们叫它勿忘我，因为它的名字就像在说‘不要忘记我’，提醒我们要记得爱的人。所以，当我们看到勿忘我时，就会想起那些重要的人，永远不会忘记他们。

en.name: Forget-me-not
en.intro: Forget-me-nots are tiny flowers with blue petals that look like little stars. Their name seems to say 'please don't forget me', gentle and very special.

story.title: 💙A Home for Little Forget-Me-Not
story.body: Spring came, and the garden was full of colorful flowers. In a corner, there was a tiny clump of blue forget-me-nots. Their flowers were small, like little blue stars. The forget-me-not felt sad. 'I am so small, who would notice me?' One day, a little bee flew over, crying, 'I'm lost! I can't find my way home!' The forget-me-not said, 'Don't worry. Look at my blue flowers; they are like little markers along the way. Follow me, and I'll guide you home.' The bee followed the forget-me-nots, flying through the garden, and finally found its home. The bee said gratefully, 'Thank you! Your flowers may be small, but they are very pretty, and you helped me. I will never forget you!' The forget-me-not smiled happily. It knew that even though it was small, it mattered. From then on, the forget-me-nots bloomed more and more, covering the corner in blue, as if telling everyone: Please don't forget me!

knowledge.title: Why is it called forget-me-not?
knowledge.body: Forget-me-nots are tiny blue flowers that look like little stars. People call them forget-me-nots because their name sounds like 'forget me not', reminding us to remember the ones we love. So, when we see forget-me-nots, we think of important people and never forget them.
